name: Gawara Baya Wind Farm
operational_notes: Wind-only per Windlab/Powerlink materials (BESS attribution of 217 MWh in prior AURES record UNVERIFIED — no BESS component in developer materials as of Jul 2026; technology reclassified from hybrid to wind). 69 turbines. All regulatory approvals held (federal EPBC Jun 2024, state Aug 2023). Powerlink connection MID amendment Jan 2026 — 'moving closer to financial close' but NO formal FC announcement yet. Windlab is Squadron Energy / Andrew Forrest-backed.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: All regulatory approvals held. Powerlink MID amendment Jan 2026 — 'approaching FC' but no formal FC announcement. Wind-only (BESS 217 MWh in prior AURES record UNVERIFIED). Status downgraded from prior 'fid' to 'cisa_signed' 2026-07-16 pending public FC confirmation.
